artifact_location_policy: All check artifacts live under verify/ and .session/, not under synthesizable rtl/.

checks.name: cmd_ready_always_high
checks.description: cmd_ready must be tied high for always-ready valid/ready protocol.

checks.name: counter_range_is_width_limited
checks.description: Counter range must be constrained to the 8-bit SSOT width and saturation constants.

checks.name: increment_saturates_at_max
checks.description: INC at SAT_MAX must hold SAT_MAX rather than wrap.

checks.name: decrement_saturates_at_min
checks.description: DEC at SAT_MIN must hold SAT_MIN rather than wrap.

checks.name: accepted_count_increments_on_accept
checks.description: When cmd_valid accepts a command, accepted_count_reg increments by one and wraps naturally at 32 bits.

checks.name: flags_are_combinational_functions_of_count
checks.description: zero/max must be combinational functions of count_reg at SAT_MIN/SAT_MAX.

tool_runs.name: post_sim_dut_lint_verilator
tool_runs.stdout:
- V e r i l a t i o n   R e p o r t: Verilator 5.046 2026-02-28 rev vUNKNOWN-built20260228
- Verilator: Built from 0.035 MB sources in 2 modules, into 0.022 MB in 3 C++ files needing 0.000 MB
- Verilator: Walltime 0.047 s (elab=0.008, cvt=0.011, bld=0.000); cpu 0.014 s on 1 threads; allocated 10.750 MB

tool_runs.name: yosys_static_elaboration_check
tool_runs.command: /opt/homebrew/bin/yosys -q -p read_verilog -sv rtl/real_llm_counter_demo.sv; hierarchy -check -top real_llm_counter_demo; proc; opt; check -assert

waivers.rationale: sby/SymbiYosys is not installed in this environment; lightweight static property checks plus yosys elaboration, iverilog compile, verilator lint, and passing scoreboard simulation are used instead.
waivers.scope: optional formal only; no waiver for required simulation/lint/compile evidence

waivers.rationale: svlint is not installed; verilator lint and existing pyslang/verilator DUT lint are used for available static lint coverage.
